note: Metadata-only workbench — prepares generation briefs and tracks empty candidate slots. Does not generate images or store art assets in v001.

briefs.generation_prompt: Minimal neutral hail placeholder: simple diamond or four-point star, high contrast, 48x48, legible at TV distance, Control Alt stroke language.
briefs.negative_prompt: photorealistic, emoji, text labels, complex shading, photographic detail

candidate_slots.notes: Reserved slot — no candidate art in workbench v001

briefs.review_notes: Seed brief from Glyph Registry v001 for the system default glyph.
